transcript: You've come to the right place. If you follow my treatment, your addiction will be gone. Please, please, I'll do anything. The doctor said if I overdose again, that'll be it. The drugs do take their toll. Are you ready to accept my treatment? Anything. What is that necklace this is this is the key to my childhood home now sleep christy when you awake your addiction will be gone gone how do you feel oh I feel great thank you so much you'll thank me by staying off the drugs oh I will see oh excuse What? It means excuse me. Oh, all good. Another one of your patients? You're still keeping us up? It feels good to finally use my condition to help someone. Yeah, but if you're going to make him do whatever you want, can you make him do something good? I mean, you'd think this one is going to work? It has to. It's just... I changed the wording, so it should... Did you bring any more referrals? Not tonight. I got a couple of them down in detox, but nobody's ready for you just yet. You should bring them to me first. Not for nothing. I like to consider you the last resort. You know, why don't the doctors here have a shot at them first? You know what I'm saying? I don't, but I leave it to you. So how does this whole thing work again? Once I feed on someone, they are under my spell, if you will. They must obey me, so so i put the command into their subconscious that they have to give up their narcotics just like that no treatment no rehab no 12 steps i am very persuasive i'm sure you are I don't know where you are. You know, you could order something to eat every now and again just to make it look good. I see plenty of young ladies sitting in restaurants not eating the food that they've ordered, and I refuse to be that wasteful. Yeah, but you know how weird it looks that I'm the only one who's actually... Christy. Who? The young lady I treated tonight. She's in distress. Yeah, because that doesn't look weird. 73 Bradley. Yeah, yeah, it's a brown house. My wife is outside. Who the hell are you? Her counselor. Here you go. Christy. She went back to her drugs she's gone I'm sorry I'm really hoping it would work this time every time it's the same thing over and over it's I think they're cured, isn't it? It's an addiction. You can't command it away because... Because I'm also an addict. My powers don't work on them. Because they don't work on me. Come here. © transcript Emily Beynon
